title: 10 best herbal teas for blocked nose
description: Thymus vulgaris, also known as thyme, teas helps with blocked nose because of its decongestant and expectorant properties. The tea's active compounds, such as thymol and carvacrol, help to break down mucus and reduce inflammation in the nasal passages. This allows for easier drainage and relief from congestion.
